usage: createPlaceBlockage [-help] [-pushdown] {  {    [-box {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -polygon {{x1 y1} {x2 y2}...} | -boxList {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...} | -allPartition  | -allMacro ]    [-inst <inst> | -hinst <hInst>]  }   [-name <string> | -prefixOn ]  [{-type {hard soft partial macroOnly}} [-density <integer>] [-excludeFlops ]]  [-noCutByCore ]  [-snapToSite ] } [       {-inst <inst>  | -hinst <hInst> | -allPartition  | -allMacro }       [-cover ]        [-innerRingBySide {<left> <bottom> <right> <top>} | -innerRingByEdge {<edge1> <edge2> ...}]        [-outerRingBySide {<left> <bottom> <right> <top>} | -outerRingByEdge {<edge1> <edge2> ...}]  ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -allMacro
options.description: placement blockage to be created around all macros

options.name: -allPartition
options.description: placement blockage to be created around all partitions

options.name: -box
options.description: placement blockage's box in <llx> <lly> <urx> <ury>

options.name: -boxList
options.description: {{lx1 ly1 ux1 uy1} {lx2 ly2 ux2 uy2}...} placement blockage's box list: llx1 lly1 urx1 ury1 ...

options.name: -cover
options.description: create a obstruction around instance

options.name: -density
options.description: density of partial or soft placement blockage

options.name: -excludeFlops
options.description: flops and latches are excluded from the partial placement blockage

options.name: -hinst
options.description: placement blockage to be created around this HInstance ((hInst), optional)

options.name: -innerRingByEdge
options.description: distance from inner placement blockage border to instance/hinstance/partition border for every edge

options.name: -innerRingBySide
options.description: {<left> <bottom> <right> <top>} distance from inner placement blockage border to instance/hinstance/partition border at <left> <bottom> <right> <top>

options.name: -inst
options.description: placement blockage to be created around this instance ((inst), optional)

options.name: -name
options.description: name of placement blockage

options.name: -noCutByCore
options.description: do not cut placement blockage by row area in core

options.name: -outerRingByEdge
options.description: distance from outer placement blockage border to instance/hinstance/partition border for every edge

options.name: -outerRingBySide
options.description: {<left> <bottom> <right> <top>} distance from outer placement blockage border to instance/hinstance/partition border at <left> <bottom> <right> <top>

options.name: -polygon
options.description: placement blockage's polygon: x1 y1 x2 y2 ...

options.name: -prefixOn
options.description: name blockage with prefix

options.name: -pushdown
options.description: set 'pushdown' attribute. Specify the blockage is pushed down into the block from the top level of the design

options.name: -snapToSite
options.description: placement blockage newly created will snap to row site

options.name: -type
options.description: type of the placement blockage to create
